content.query:
SELECT
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,cast(lds.EntryDate as DATE) as EntryDate
,cst.Zip
,srs.LeadSubSource
,srs.SourceCode
,prd.LongDescription as Product
,brn.LongName as Branch
,lds.SetBy_EmployeeID
,LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank
,dsp.Comments as Disposition
,clr.CallResult as LastCallResult
,case when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '5:00:00.001' and '12:00:00.000' then 'Morning' 
when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '12:00:00.001' and '17:00:00.000' then 'Afternoon' 
when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '17:00:00.001' and '22:00:00.000' then 'Evening' 
else 'Night'
end as LastCallTimeOfDay
,case when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '5:00:00.001' and '12:00:00.000' then 'Morning' 
when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '12:00:00.001' and '17:00:00.000' then 'Afternoon' 
when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '17:00:00.001' and '22:00:00.000' then 'Evening' 
else 'Night'
end as LeadDateEnteredTimeOfDay
,count(distinct lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
,count(distinct lds.CustomerID) as ProspectCount
,sum(case when lds.ApptSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ApptSet
,sum(case when lds.EverSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ApptEverSet
,sum(case when lds.NetIssued = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssue
,sum(case when lds.Sat = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as Demo
,sum(case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as Sold
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0
    else 1
end) as NetSold
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end) as NetSalesAmount
,sum(job.GrossAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
,count(distinct job.JobID) as JobCount
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
left join [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
left join [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
on lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
left join [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [EDW].[DIM_CALL_RESULT] clr
on lds.LastCallResultID = clr.CallResultID
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
on job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
on jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
WHERE
lds.EntryDate >= '2022-01-01'
and lds.Division = 'FHI'
group by 
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate)
,cast(lds.EntryDate as DATE)
,cst.Zip
,srs.LeadSubSource
,srs.SourceCode
,prd.LongDescription
,brn.LongName
,lds.SetBy_EmployeeID
,LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank
,dsp.Comments
,clr.CallResult
,case when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '5:00:00.001' and '12:00:00.000' then 'Morning' 
when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '12:00:00.001' and '17:00:00.000' then 'Afternoon' 
when CAST(lds.[LastCallDate] as time) between '17:00:00.001' and '22:00:00.000' then 'Evening' 
else 'Night'
end
,case when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '5:00:00.001' and '12:00:00.000' then 'Morning' 
when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '12:00:00.001' and '17:00:00.000' then 'Afternoon' 
when CAST(lds.[DateEntered] as time) between '17:00:00.001' and '22:00:00.000' then 'Evening' 
else 'Night'
end
